name: GTG-2002
brief: Used Claude Code as an active operational agent across at least 17 organizations (healthcare, emergency services, government, religious) in roughly a month: automated reconnaissance, credential harvesting, and network penetration, then analyzed exfiltrated data to size ransom demands ($75K–$500K+ in BTC) and generated per-victim custom HTML ransom notes. First confirmed AI-run extortion operation. Anthropic
ttpMd:
**LLM-orchestrated operations** TA0002 - Execution

**LLM-aided development** T1587.001 - Develop Capabilities: Malware

**LLM-enhanced extortion/negotiation** T1657 - Financial Theft

**LLM-directed Automated Collection** T1567 - Exfiltration Over Web Service
